title: Burston Prime

description.canonical: Once thought lost to the ages, attempts to reengineer the Burston Prime never fully replicated this weapon's power and agility.
description.display: （英文：BURSTON PRIME）一度以为随着岁月流逝而失去踪迹，尝试研发伯斯顿 Prime 但从没能够复制出往日的威力以及操控性。

summary: （英文：BURSTON PRIME）一度以为随着岁月流逝而失去踪迹，尝试研发伯斯顿 Prime 但从没能够复制出往日的威力以及操控性。
